flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Converse University rose 27% between 2021 and 2024 ($19.9k → $25.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Converse University rose 27% between 2021 and 2024 ($19.9k → $25.2k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 9 pp at Converse University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (47.1% vs 56.4%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Converse University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5% → 0.0%).
